title: Stock market today: Dow, S&P 500, Nasdaq rise on US-Japan deal hopes, with Tesla and Google on deck Wall Street is getting ready for Tesla and Google-parent Alphabet to fire up "Magnificent 7" earnings.
Trending tickers: Krispy Kreme, Texas Instruments, Toyota, Tencent and SAP The latest investor updates on stocks that are trending on Wednesday.
Gold loses lustre as US-Japan deal curbs safe-haven demand US tariff deal with Japan has improved global trade sentiment.
Global stocks soar as traders eye Tesla and Alphabet earnings Alphabet and Tesla are set to release updates on Wednesday — the first of the 'Magnificent 7' to report for the second quarter.

Which Mag 7 stocks will be the top performers this earnings season? The latest earnings season will be another test for the "Magnificent 7" tech behemoths, some of which have recovered more recently following a turbulent start to 2025
